nameMeanings.name: Selby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire) and Scottish: habitational name from Selby (Yorkshire). The placename may derive from Old English sele ‘willow copse’, sometimes alternating with salh ‘willow’, + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Shelby
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): probably a variant of   Selby  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Selby was born in 1417, in Biddlestone Hall, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of James de Selby. She had at least 1 daughter with Thomas Haggerston. She died in Haggerston Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Biddlestone, Alnwick district, Northumbe: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドビッドレストーン ハル
ja.Haggerston Castle, Haggerston, Berwick-U: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドハグジャーストン カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Selbyは1417年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドビッドレストーン ハルでJames de Selbyの娘として生まれた。彼女はThomas Haggerstonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドハグジャーストン カストルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Selby(은)는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 비들레스톤 홀에서 James de Selby의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas Haggerston(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 해그르스턴 카스틀에서 사망했다.
